title: AdvancedKeep
description: Control player item and exp keep
body:
AdvancedKeep is a lightweight plugin to control keeping player inventory and exp. # Features: - Per-world configuration - Permission keep - Time-based keep - Integration with claim plugins: GriefPrevention, Lands, Towny, SaberFactions - WorldGuard flags: keep-item and keep-exp - Death tracker: Obtain your death location - Soul Gem: Put in inventory to keep both item and exp - RGB support for items and messages # Commands: /ak give soulgem : Gives soul gems
/ak debug: Enable debug mode
/ak reload: Reload the plugin # Permission: keep.death-tracker: Obtain your death location
keep.item: Always keep item
keep.exp: Always keep exp
# FAQ: ### 1. Will the plugin interfere with other plugins? The plugin has been designed to be compatible with other plugins. However, some plugins that handle player deaths may cause incompatibilities.
In that case, enable debug mode to know how the plugin works. If you need help, please get in touch with me on my Discord server. ### 2. How to keep item and exp per player per world? You can use LuckPerms and set permission keep.item and keep.exp per world. ### 3. How to keep inventory for a few minutes? LuckPerms allows you to set timed permission (see #2) ### 4. How to make region-based keep? The plugin supports WorldGuard for that. There are two flags: keep-item and keep-exp # Support Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/HRAEKapRwx) server for plugin support ![https://i.imgur.com/qLjSqSU.png](https://i.imgur.com/qLjSqSU.png)
